page: The Microsoft Azure D64s_v4 is a general-purpose server belonging to the DSv4 family. It is equipped with 64 virtual CPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance is powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 32 physical cores running at a base speed of 2.6 GHz. It operates on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, utilizing dedicated CPU allocation with hyper-threading enabled.

Hardware capabilities include a 35 MB L3 cache and support for advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX512F, and AVX512_VNNI, alongside AES cryptography. In benchmark evaluations, the D64s_v4 demonstrates strong multi-core CPU performance, scoring 59595.87 in stress-ng multi-core tests. It also exhibits strong large-block memory bandwidth, reaching 212.55 GB/sec for read operations and 95.66 GB/sec for write operations. Single-core performance, software compilation, and ray tracing benchmarks fall within the average tier.

This server does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, but it is Premium Storage capable. This hardware profile offers a balanced resource density suitable for multi-threaded applications, database operations, software compilation, and medium-scale language model inference tasks.
description: The Microsoft Azure D64s_v4 is a general-purpose server from the DSv4 family, featuring 64 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 32 physical cores running at 2.6 GHz, this instance utilizes the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It lacks local storage but is Premium Storage capable. Performance benchmarks show strong multi-core CPU capabilities and strong large-block memory bandwidth, while single-core metrics and database operations perform in the average tier. The instance is suited for multi-threaded workloads, software compilation, and database operations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D64s_v4 is a general-purpose server featuring 64 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor. It offers strong multi-core performance and is Premium Storage capable.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D64s_v4 is a general-purpose server with 64 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor, optimized for multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, strong multi-core performance, and high memory bandwidth for multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 64 vCPUs and 256 GB RAM powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor
Strong multi-core CPU performance and large-block memory bandwidth
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
Supports AVX-512 vector extensions and AES cryptography
Suited for multi-threaded applications, databases, and software compilation
